_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning strategies for building our confidence, adaptability and perseverance when facing challenges, including how to draw on our personal strengths and healthy coping methods.

_source.w: We are learning strategies for building our confidence, adaptability and perseverance when facing challenges, including how to draw on our personal strengths and healthy coping methods.
y: Confidence, adaptability and perseverance are not fixed traits — they are skills we can deliberately strengthen with practice.
These qualities help us navigate the pressures of adolescence and prepare us for the uncertainties and demands of adult life.
Understanding the enablers and barriers to these qualities helps us create conditions for our own success.
eg: We investigate perseverance and adaptability as entrepreneurial characteristics, studying case studies of people who succeeded in business because of these qualities.
We explore the lives of artists, athletes or scientists who persevered through significant challenges and reflect on what we can learn from their experiences.
We identify factors that build confidence — like preparation, practice, positive self-talk and supportive relationships — and create a personal confidence plan.
We discuss specific barriers to perseverance, such as fear of failure or perfectionism, and brainstorm strategies for overcoming them.
We share examples of times we adapted our approach when something was not working and reflect on what helped us make that shift.
We design a challenge for ourselves that requires stepping outside our comfort zone, then journal about the experience afterwards.
